meta.title: The UAE: The New Wall Street of Digital Finance

transcript:
Viktor Fischer: We were just talking with Marco backstage, it's our sixth day of conference because was Abu Dhabi Finance Week and we were shilling Solana to TradFi investors from Monday until Thursday. So we thought would be good that we would explain you what we are actually working on. And so, you know, I founded RockawayX in 2018, and then in September, Solmate was a Solana DAT being put together, they were raising 300 million dollars, and from RockawayX we invested 50 million, so we were anchor investor of that DAT. And that's how our joint work started. Now, this was just the beginning, because then we started to, you know, discuss and talk and we actually realized it's much better that we shift the DAT business into a revenue and an earnings business. And so we decided to combine the two entities. We announced the combination last Thursday. We'll take, you know, couple of, like 30 to 60 days to close it, but here we are already working together. So let me give you a brief overview of what actually is RockawayX and what actually will be there for Solmate. So number one, we have infrastructure business. We were running the first testnet validator of Solana, just, you know, manually we put it, we bought hardware in Prague and put it together on a desk and then we were chatting with Toly and Dan and the team how it was actually performing. Now it grew up to, we have roughly one billion dollars of assets under stake. We have roughly 50 blockchains that we are running, but most important is Solana. We are also Double Zero contributor, and out of Europe we are running London, Amsterdam, Frankfurt, Prague and Oslo connections, and we are just about to connect also the UAE. So we are becoming, as Marco will explain, we are helping UAE to become the center of digital finance. Now yesterday, we announced a new product, which is an RPC, but we call it RPE, so Remote Procedure Execution, where the, it's called Zela, Z-E-L-A, like zero latency dot io, is basically for developers an RPC which is located very close to the node, so close to the leader, and we are following the leaders globally, and you send a program transaction, that transaction executes right next to the leader, wherever the next leader is, and as a result you have a super fast responses. The second our big division is liquidity. And we are mostly known for a DeFi fund. We run a market neutral private credit fund which lends to DeFi protocols. And we have been doing, we did 19% net per annum last year. This year we are on track to do 15% net. And we are lending to protocols like Huma, Kamino, OnRe, Solstice, also of course on EVM chains like Morpho. We had zero defaults since 2022, including during for example FTX crash. For our investors, this fund is 150 million dollars in size. It invests roughly into 40 protocols currently. And for our investors this means, you know, monthly liquidity, 8x Sharpe ratio. But this fund was USD in, USD out. So it's only dollar in, dollar out for investors, but not stablecoins. Now we wanted to also, you know, leverage DeFi more and help crypto natives to generate yield. And in EVM chains, who knows what is vault curation? On for example Morpho V2? Yeah, so right now in DeFi you can be, you know, MEV Capital is doing that, Edge Capital, Steakhouse. And so you can go on DeFi protocols and be a curator of a vault. There is roughly, how much, 8 billion dollars of TVL in these vaults, only 12% is in Solana. And we want to increase that Solana market share much more. And so we just announced today, my colleague Adam announced, that we are launching vault curation on Solana with Kamino, Exponent and Midas. This will be launched in January. So more yield coming to Solana, more TVL growth as well. And our third division has always been asset management, so this basically investing. We are right now venture capital investors, so we led the seed round of Solana, we also invested into, you know, Double Zero, Kamino, Squads, OnRe, Exponent. Our latest investment we'll just announce very soon is co-leading an round in BetHog. So that's it for RockawayX. Infrastructure, liquidity, asset management. All of these three activities are now part of Solmate. And we'll help Solmate to grow UAE as a strategic location. We also have opened Solana City in Dubai. If you are in Dubai, Q East by Alphabeta in Al Quoz, join us. This is how it looks like. It's beautiful. It's a coworking space. Marco?

Marco Santori: So we talked about what RockawayX has built. And you might also know a little bit about what Solmate's done over the last few months. We raised a 300 million dollar PIPE. We are a Nasdaq traded company under the ticker SLMT. Um, and we have a treasury. It's big. And it's growing. It's a SOL treasury specifically. That's what we're laser focused on and that's what we're going to be laser focused on after the merger as well. But what happens when you put that together with RockawayX? With what Viktor just explained earlier today? Um, well, the UAE is a big part of it. Right now, you've got almost 30% of stake up in Frankfurt. You've got matching engines in Tokyo. And you've got nothing in between. Well, actually, until just a few weeks ago, you had nothing in between. The UAE is what brought us here. Right? It's what brought us all here together. It brought us here because of clear regulation, crypto adoption. It already has the talent. We believe we have an aligned government here. We think the geographic location is primed. And there's also plenty of infrastructure here. We have the fiber optics that we need. We have the data centers that we need. As of, gosh, just last month, we started validating transactions here in the UAE. Um, we actually validated what we think is the first block here in the UAE. Um, but right now we're only validating about, mm, one block every four minutes. Um, that's not enough. I want to get to a place where we are validating blocks much more often than that. To a place where we can actually sell comprehensive transaction landing services to the market more broadly and grow as the ecosystem grows. But it's going to be a three step process. Step one, we're already doing. We're already here. Step one in any Proof of Stake network is to get stake. We have our treasury for that. We want to grow it. We want to start growing third party stake as well. With enough stake, we can attract other participants and create a center for trading right here in the UAE. We can bring traders, hedge funds, market makers, exchanges, here. Right here. In between what you saw on the map, in between Frankfurt, Northern Europe, the East Coast of the United States, and Asia. And then when you zoom out, once you've brought all that here, well, you've got a full blown center for tokenization. And that's a trend that's growing daily. Right? We have the Chairman of the SEC saying it's going to happen within the next two years that all financial markets are going to be moving on, onchain as a matter of tokenization. I think that's aggressive. But I don't think it's unrealistic. What it really means is that by the end of the day, what you've built is a Wall Street for digital finance. If you look at the map of financial centers in the world, look. There's nothing here. There's nothing here. I, I, I think that's a travesty and I think that we can do better. But I don't think we can do it by improving Wall Street. I don't think we can do it by tokenizing Wall Street. I don't think we can do it by shortening T plus 2 to T plus 0. I think we can leapfrog it. I think we can rebuild it here from scratch. Um, and that's what tech has always done, right? It's actually very rarely changed things from the inside. It started over and built anew and built fresher. We can do it here with stake. We can do it on Solana. Um, and when we do, we think we can end up with 3 to 5% of the UAE's GDP coming just from that kind of work. That's, uh, an enormous number. It's ambitious. But I think it's a place that we can get and I think that's the north star that we should be looking at. This place has the infrastructure. Uh, we are building a treasury. Uh, it already has the regulatory and legal frameworks that we need here to build it. And of course the talent and human capital. I mean look who it's attracted already. Um, Viktor and I when we sat down to talk about what RockawayX and Solmate would look like together, well this is what we came up with. We actually do believe we can build a brand new Wall Street and we can do it here. We can do it better, cheaper, faster. Um, and we can make the UAE a home for that.

Viktor Fischer: Internet capital markets.

Marco Santori: Thank you.

Dec 4, 2025 8:45 AM Eastern Standard Time
# **Solmate (Nasdaq: SLMT) Announces Term Sheet to Acquire RockawayX, Creating Institutional Crypto Giant with Over $2 Billion in Combined AUM and Third-party Stake**
Share
*Strategic Combination would Combine Solmate’s Capital Markets Access with RockawayX’s Expertise in Infrastructure, Liquidity and Asset Management*
ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates--([BUSINESS WIRE](https://www.businesswire.com))--Solmate Infrastructure (“Solmate”) (Brera Holdings PLC, NASDAQ: SLMT), the Solana infrastructure company with a strategic focus on Abu Dhabi, today announced the signing of a non-binding term sheet for a business combination with RockawayX. This would mark a transformation from a passive digital asset treasury to an integrated infrastructure, liquidity and asset management business.
**Transaction Highlights**
* Solmate would purchase all of the equity of RockawayX in an all-stock transaction, forming a crypto enterprise that integrates infrastructure, liquidity and asset management under one unified entity
* The combined entity would continue to trade under the ticker SLMT on the Nasdaq
* Marco Santori continues as Solmate CEO, overseeing the unif

Dec 04, 2025
# Solmate looks beyond SOL treasury model with RockawayX acquisition
The deal would fold RockawayX’s infrastructure, liquidity and asset-management businesses into Solmate, widening revenue streams for the SOL-focused treasury company.
Listen0:00
![Solmate looks beyond SOL treasury model with RockawayX acquisition]()
News
COINTELEGRAPH IN YOUR SOCIAL FEED
[Follow our](https://www.instagram.com/cointelegraph/)[Subscribe on](https://www.youtube.com/@cointelegraph)
[
](https://www.facebook.com/cointelegraph)[

](https://www.reddit.com/r/CoinTelegraph/)[
](https://www.linkedin.com/company/cointelegraph/)
Solmate, formerly Brera Holdings PLC, has signed a nonbinding term sheet to acquire RockawayX, a deal that would shift the Abu Dhabi–based Solana company from a passive digital-asset treasury to a unified platform offering infrastructure, liquidity and asset-management services.
According to Thursday’s[announcement](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20251204174944/en/Solmate-Nasdaq-SLMT-Announces-Term-Sheet-to-Acquire-RockawayX-Creating-Institutional-Crypto-Giant-with-Over-$2-Billion-in-Combined-AUM-and-Third-party-Stake), the all-stock deal would see Solmate acquire all of RockawayX’s operations, including its validator infrastructure and onchain liquidity business, as well as its

tags.impact_reason: Merger of Solmate and RockawayX creates a significant institutional player focused on Solana infrastructure and DeFi, including running validators and providing liquidity, with substantial AUM and TradFi connections.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic server monolith as the anchor because it represents the 'Digital Wall Street' infrastructure being built by Solmate and RockawayX. The glowing fiber optic cables signify high-frequency trading and the new connection bridging the liquidity gap between Europe and the UAE. I included the text 'ZELA' as a holographic brand on the hardware, directly referencing their new 'Zero Latency' product and making it a diegetic part of the high-tech environment.
visual_idea.description: A colossal, monolithic server rack stands in a vast, sleek data center with architectural lines inspired by the UAE's futuristic skyline. The monolith, crafted from dark, anodized aluminum, is the central focus. Thick bundles of fiber optic cables, glowing with pulsing blue and gold light, flow into its core from the floor, representing the new connection to Europe. A subtle, holographic projection of the word 'ZELA' glows on a glass panel of the server, like a system status indicator, casting a soft light on the intricate hardware within. The background recedes into darkness, filled with rows of repeating servers, creating a sense of immense scale.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A colossal, monolithic server rack, crafted from dark, anodized aluminum with a subtle metallic sheen and intricate surface texture, stands as the central focus in a vast, sleek data center. The architectural lines of the data center are inspired by the UAE's futuristic skyline, emphasizing height and grandeur. Thick bundles of fiber optic cables, glowing intensely with pulsing blue and gold light, flow from the polished floor directly into the core of the server monolith, representing the new connection to Europe. A subtle, holographic projection of the word 'ZELA' glows with a soft, ethereal light on a prominent glass panel of the server, functioning like a system status indicator and casting a gentle illumination onto the intricate hardware visible within. Volumetric lighting emanates from the glowing fiber optics and the 'ZELA' projection, creating atmospheric light rays and a sense of dynamic energy within the dark, expansive space. The background recedes into deep darkness, filled with endless rows of repeating servers that blur into the distance, reinforcing the immense, epic scale of the central monolith. The composition is vertical (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing the monumental height of the server rack with ample negative space at the top, making the subject feel truly monumental and imposing. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, physically based rendering (PBR), cinematic lighting, high contrast.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a futuristic server monolith as the anchor because it represents the 'Digital Wall Street' infrastructure being built by Solmate and RockawayX. The glowing fiber optic cables signify high-frequency trading and the new connection bridging the liquidity gap between Europe and the UAE. I included the text 'ZELA' as a holographic brand on the hardware, directly referencing their new 'Zero Latency' product and making it a diegetic part of the high-tech environment.
visual_idea.description: A macro close-up on the core of the server monolith. The frame is densely packed with interwoven fiber optic cables, each strand pulsing with brilliant blue and gold light, representing massive data flow. The cables converge into a central, polished chrome port, reflecting the intense light. The focus is on the texture of the glowing cables and the sheer density of the connection, conveying speed and power at a micro-level.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro close-up on the core of a towering server monolith. The 1:1 square frame is intensely packed, showcasing a symmetrical, centrally focused mass of interwoven fiber optic cables. Each individual strand pulses with brilliant, dynamic blue and gold volumetric light, vividly representing massive data flow. These luminous cables converge with extreme density into a highly polished chrome port, which exquisitely reflects the intense light, creating sharp, vibrant refractions. The surrounding structure of the monolith features a sleek, dark anodized aluminum finish, subtly textured and durable, contrasting with the glowing fibers. Focus is hyper-detailed on the intricate textures of the glowing cables and the sheer, overwhelming density of the connection, conveying immense speed and raw power at a micro-level, with subtle volumetric light interacting with the ambient space, emphasizing depth and atmosphere. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering, volumetric light, cinematic, studio lighting, ultra-sharp.

editorial.headline: Solmate Acquires RockawayX to Build Digital Wall Street in UAE
editorial.standfirst: Nasdaq-listed Solmate pivots from passive treasury to active infrastructure giant. The merger targets the geographic liquidity gap between Europe and Asia to establish the UAE as the premier hub for high-frequency crypto trading.
key_takeaways: Solmate (Nasdaq: SLMT) acquires RockawayX, merging a $300M treasury with over $1B in staked assets.
Launch of 'Zela' (Remote Procedure Execution) and vault curation with Kamino aims to capture institutional yield.
The entity targets 3-5% of UAE GDP by building 'Internet Capital Markets' on Solana.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The institutional landscape of Solana just witnessed a massive consolidation event. **Solmate** (Nasdaq: SLMT), previously known as a passive holder of SOL, has executed a definitive pivot to active infrastructure by acquiring **RockawayX**. The deal transforms Solmate from a simple treasury vehicle into a vertically integrated powerhouse combining validator infrastructure, liquidity provision, and asset management. The acquisition follows **Solmate**'s recent $300M PIPE raise, anchored by a $50M investment from **RockawayX** itself, effectively merging the capital access of a public company with the technical prowess of a crypto-native veteran.

The strategic rationale centers on geography and latency. **Viktor Fischer**, founder of **RockawayX**, and **Marco Santori**, CEO of **Solmate**, identified a critical void in the global liquidity map: the disconnect between matching engines in Tokyo and stake concentrations in Frankfurt. By establishing physical infrastructure in the **UAE**, the combined entity aims to bridge this gap. This isn't just about holding tokens; it is about owning the pipes. They have already begun validating blocks locally and introduced **Zela**, a Remote Procedure Execution (RPE) product designed to execute transactions right next to the leader node, drastically reducing latency for high-frequency traders.

Beyond infrastructure, the merger aggressively targets institutional yield. **RockawayX** brings a market-neutral private credit fund with a track record of 15-19% net returns and zero defaults since 2022. To deepen Solana's DeFi maturity, the team is launching vault curation in January with partners like **Kamino**, **Exponent**, and **Midas**. With only 12% of the $8B vault curation market currently on Solana, the growth upside is substantial. This move allows **Solmate** to offer comprehensive transaction lending services, moving beyond simple staking rewards to capture value from the complex financial flows of the ecosystem.

Ultimately, **Santori** views this as an opportunity to leapfrog legacy finance entirely. Rather than tokenizing existing Wall Street assets to shorten settlement times, **Solmate** intends to build a "clean slate" financial center in Abu Dhabi. The ambition is high: capturing 3-5% of the **UAE**'s GDP by creating what they term "Internet Capital Markets." With the regulatory alignment of the UAE and the combined capital of **Solmate** and **RockawayX**, the race to build the physical backbone of digital finance has officially begun.
